v7.0k: Changed from DonorCohort(202501). Donor imported absolute rates (-0.055 at MOB4) vs 202506 own MOB3 actual -0.045; 10bp level mismatch drives -£340k total variance. ShapeBorrowScaled scales donor shape to 202506 own MOB3 rate.

v7.0k: Changed from DonorCohort(202506). 202506 only had 3 own data points so donor produced a flat line (no shape). 202505 has 4 own actuals + full 12-MOB shape. ShapeBorrowScaled scaled to 202507 own MOB2 rate.

v7.0k: Changed from StaticCohortAvg(1). Single data point gave flat-line forecast. ShapeBorrowScaled(202507, ratio:1) borrows 202507 ramp shape scaled to 202508 own MOB1 rate (-0.04911), capturing natural ramp vs flat hold.

v7.0k: Changed from DonorCohort(202507). 202507 is a donor-of-a-donor chain producing a flat line. 202505 has 4 own actuals + full 12-MOB shape. ShapeBorrowScaled scaled to 202509 own MOB1 rate to break the flat-chain.
v7.0a: 202509 had no rules. SegMedian for MOB 13-36.
